problem_solved: People in need struggle to find and access available social services in their communities, creating barriers to basic needs like housing, food, and utilities
solution_description: Nationwide community resource hotline and database connecting people to local social services. Available 24/7 by dialing 211, provides referrals to food pantries, housing assistance, utility help, employment services, and other community resources. Partners with government agencies, nonprofits, and corporations
traction_signals: Partnerships with Ad Council, IBM, Lyft, SingleCare
notes: Foundational SDOH infrastructure. Not a tech platform but critical resource directory. Many SDOH platforms (Findhelp, Unite Us) integrate 211 data. Operated by local United Ways. Essential but not directly monetizable for Varden
